trivia: The modernized 42 brought six-blade props and PW127 power to the small ATR, keeping 48-seat turboprop flying alive on islands, mountains and short strips worldwide.
Turboprops fly low and slow, which paradoxically makes them harder for distant antennas: an ATR catch says something about your setup.
funFacts: Six-blade propellers cut cabin noise dramatically.
